reviews.review_description:
The presentations are a bit boring - basically PowerPoint on a wall in a room. What is fascinating is the surgery videos.

Only the first nodule is "complete" with 360 video and laparoscopy video feeds. The others are more like teasers.

PROS: Medical videos are fascinating to watch and there is a lot of good information for medical students.

CONS: Requires an account to use and muse be online. Videos need a time slider.

WORTH 30 minutes to an hour? Absolutely, but unlikely to return until new content is made available.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback. There are now many more modules available and new modules are in the pipeline. We are currently also refining the presentation of learning materials to make the slides etc more engaging. We have also added a time slider to all our videos

reviews.review_description: you must go the website and register a account first, then you can login in. it is about a medical , surgery kind of things, but i'm not that major!
Downloading this app will Just waste your data. Every time I try to submit my email address and password it says either password or email address is incorrect
